name: Fish Sauce
steps: Bring Stock to the boil, add ginger and slow down the fire. Infuse for 15 minutes, add the rest of the liquid. Simmer for 5 more minutes.
Clean Fish Bones in cold running water.
Rinse until no blood is left on the bones.
Place bones in a large pan covered with water and bring to the boil. Once boiling, keep skimming.
Add all vegetables and keep simmering for 3 hours.
After stock is ready, cool down and pass through muslin cloth.
Vacuum in small 500 gr portions and keep in freezer.
Make sure before you vacuum sauce it's 100% cooled down and cold.
